autoReg 0.3.5

    • Statistical tests in gaze
    • Survival Analysis

Return maximum character number except NA

Source: R/print.gaze.R
maxnchar.Rd

Return maximum character number except NA

Usage

maxnchar(x)

Arguments

x

a vector

Value

A numeric vector of length 1

Examples

x=c(1,2,"sadf",NA)
maxnchar(x)
#> [1] 4
data(acs,package="moonBook")
lapply(acs,maxnchar)
#> $age
#> [1] 2
#> 
#> $sex
#> [1] 6
#> 
#> $cardiogenicShock
#> [1] 3
#> 
#> $entry
#> [1] 7
#> 
#> $Dx
#> [1] 15
#> 
#> $EF
#> [1] 4
#> 
#> $height
#> [1] 5
#> 
#> $weight
#> [1] 5
#> 
#> $BMI
#> [1] 11
#> 
#> $obesity
#> [1] 3
#> 
#> $TC
#> [1] 5
#> 
#> $LDLC
#> [1] 3
#> 
#> $HDLC
#> [1] 2
#> 
#> $TG
#> [1] 3
#> 
#> $DM
#> [1] 3
#> 
#> $HBP
#> [1] 3
#> 
#> $smoking
#> [1] 9
#>
